body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/198925343?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/francisbergin", "id": 198925343, "login": "francisbergin", "node_id": "U_kgDOC9tcHw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/francisbergin", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41016", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-295", "name": "Improper Certificate Validation"}], "description": "Apache Airflow's SMTP provider `SmtpHook` called Python's `smtplib.SMTP.starttls()` without an SSL context, so no certificate validation was performed on the TLS upgrade. A man-in-the-middle between the Airflow worker and the SMTP server could present a self-signed certificate, complete the STARTTLS upgrade, and capture the SMTP credentials sent during the subsequent `login()` call. Users are advised to upgrade to the `apache-airflow-providers-smtp` version that contains the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00268, "percentile": 0.185}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x8mh-94wc-33gv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-22T13:04:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8mh-94wc-33gv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x8mh-94wc-33gv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41016"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-30T10:16:01Z", "published_at": "2026-04-30T12:33:11Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41016", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65346", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/gb202qy5r31bgdd3d51d7s5o1jh40kc4", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow-providers-smtp/PYSEC-2026-24.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8mh-94wc-33gv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "apache-airflow-providers-smtp: No certificate validation on SMTP STARTTLS connections in SMTP provider", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-22T13:04:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x8mh-94wc-33gv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow-providers-smtp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 3.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: apache-airflow-providers-smtp: No certificate validation on SMTP STARTTLS connections in SMTP provider
